faqs.question: How much does bed bug treatment cost in Red Hook?
faqs.answer: Bed bug treatment in Red Hook typically ranges from $1,200 to $3,500 depending on the size of your space, infestation severity, and treatment method. Studio apartments usually cost $1,200–$1,800, while larger multi-bedroom homes may require $2,500–$3,500. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before any work begins.

faqs.question: What bed bug treatment methods do you use in Red Hook?
faqs.answer: We offer both heat treatment and chemical applications, often combining methods for maximum effectiveness. Heat treatment raises room temperatures to 135°F+ to kill all bed bug life stages instantly, while our EPA-approved chemical treatments provide residual protection. Our technician will recommend the best approach based on your specific situation and building type.

faqs.question: How long does bed bug treatment take in Red Hook apartments?
faqs.answer: Most Red Hook bed bug treatments take 4-8 hours depending on the size of your apartment and treatment method chosen. Heat treatments typically complete in one intensive session, while chemical treatments may require 2-3 visits spaced 10-14 days apart to target all life cycles. We'll provide a detailed timeline during your free inspection.

faqs.question: Do I need to leave my Red Hook apartment during bed bug treatment?
faqs.answer: For heat treatments, you'll need to vacate for 6-8 hours while we bring temperatures to lethal levels. For chemical treatments, we typically recommend staying out for 4-6 hours until surfaces dry completely. Pets should also be removed during treatment. We'll provide detailed preparation instructions and work around your schedule to minimize disruption.
